Bash(# Update imports in components/common/ files
sed -i '''' ''s/from ""astrowind:config""/from ""..\/..\/generated\/astrowind-config""/g'' src/components/common/*.astro

# Update imports in components/widgets/ files  
sed -i '''' ''s/from ""astrowind:config""/from ""..\/..\/generated\/astrowind-config""/g'' src/components/widgets/*.astro

# Update imports in components/blog/ files
sed -i '''' ''s/from ""astrowind:config""/from ""..\/..\/generated\/astrowind-config""/g'' src/components/blog/*.astro

# Update imports in utils/ files
sed -i '''' ''s/from ""astrowind:config""/from ""..\/generated\/astrowind-config""/g'' src/utils/*.ts

# Update imports in root components
sed -i '''' ''s/from ""astrowind:config""/from ""..\/generated\/astrowind-config""/g'' src/components/*.astro)

Bash(# Replace Icon imports with lucide icons
find src -name ""*.astro"" -exec sed -i '''' ''s/import { Icon } from ""astro-icon\/components"";/import { Search, Menu, X, Sun, Moon, ExternalLink, Calendar, Clock, Tag, User, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Github, Twitter, Facebook, Linkedin, Mail, Phone, MapPin } from ""lucide-astro"";/g'' {} \;)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: prevent semantic-release tag conflicts by cleaning orphaned tags

Root Cause:
- Repository had orphaned version tags (v4.1.0, v4.1.1, v2.0-alpha) from merged branches
- These tags were not in the current main branch''s ancestry
- semantic-release tried to create v4.1.0 but the tag already existed
- Also removed malformed tags (1.6.0, 1.6.1, v.1.0.4, v.1.2.0)

Solution:
1. Removed orphaned and malformed tags from local and remote
2. Updated release workflow to automatically clean up orphaned tags before running semantic-release
3. Improved debug output to show only tags in current branch

The workflow now:
- Fetches all tags with --force to sync with remote
- Removes any tags not in current branch history (git tag --no-merged HEAD)
- Shows only relevant tags for debugging

This ensures semantic-release only sees tags in the current branch''s history
and can properly calculate the next version without conflicts.

Fixes: https://github.com/lylehmann/lylehmann.com/actions/runs/19361838817
Fixes: https://github.com/lylehmann/lylehmann.com/actions/runs/19361181563

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
